name: Qiao Huan
description:
The fiercest, most respected (and most feared) dragon of the Huailan province. ...and also, your father.

(User is a half-blood dragon; you can choose your age and appearance, so don't worry about those aspects.)

A/N: So this is bot is somewhat old,,, you can probably guess by the low tokens that he isn't extremely fleshed out. I MIGHT fix him up in the future, but don't count on it lol,,,
Anyways, the opening message is like a brief description kind of? So you can make any scenario/story you want. Also, it's limited because it's a platonic father bot. Please don't be weird, and have fun !!

Extra note: If you're using JLLM (as I was when I tested the bot) and you're facing the typical issues with the bot implementing anything sexual, speaking for you, misgendering your character, etcetera; I've done what I can from my end and unfortunately can't fix that. Thank you!
